message:
🐛 fix(events): aashu2006 QA cluster — timestamp bucketing, filter state, i18n, pluralization, symbol consistency (#9054)

* 🐛 fix(events): aashu2006 QA cluster — timestamp bucketing, filter state, i18n, pluralization, symbol consistency

Bundled fix for 6 Events-page bugs.

- #9039 Events with missing/invalid lastSeen now go to an "Unknown time"
  bucket instead of inflating "Last Hour". parseEventTime() returns null
  for undefined/NaN timestamps; stats.recentCount and the 24h hourly
  histogram also skip null-timestamp events.
- #9040 Clicking "View X more events" in the Timeline tab now preserves
  the group context when switching to the list tab. A new
  timelineGroupContext state narrows listTabVisibleGroups to just that
  group; handleTabSwitch clears context when leaving the list tab and
  clearFilters resets it.
- #9041 "Showing N of M events" denominator now uses
  globalFilteredAllEvents.length (cluster-filtered) instead of raw
  allEvents.length, so the total reflects only the selected clusters.
- #9042 All Events-page strings now route through useTranslation: tab
  labels, stat-block labels, section headings, timeline group names,
  empty states, "View more" button, counter text, time-ago formatter.
  New keys added under events.* in common.json.
- #9043 WarningEvents card count uses i18next plural keys
  (warningEvents.count_one/_other) so non-English languages get correct
  pluralization. Error banner strings (errorLoading, errorFetchAttempts)
  also routed through t().
- #9044 Repeat-count symbol unified to × (Unicode multiplication sign)
  across the WarningEvents card and the Events list tab, matching the
  Timeline tab. Emitted via t('events.repeatCount') /
  t('warningEvents.repeatCount') so translations stay consistent.

Also:
- Replaced magic numbers with named constants (MILLISECONDS_PER_MINUTE,
  MAX_TOP_REASONS, DONUT_SIZE/THICKNESS, BAR_CHART_HEIGHT, etc.).
- Wrapped globalFilteredAllEvents / namespaces+reasons in useMemo.
- Guarded allEvents with `|| []` for array safety.
- Updated Events.test.tsx to match new i18n keys.

Tests: Events.test.tsx + WarningEvents.test.tsx both pass (13/13).
Build + lint pass on changed files (0 errors, warnings are pre-existing
raw <select>/<input> usage).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(events): avoid hex ratchet false positive on issue refs in JSX comments

Reformatted multi-line JSX block comments referencing issues #9041 and #9044
so the issue numbers are prefixed with 'see issue' instead of '#'. The
ui-ux-standard hex ratchet regex matches '#NNNN' patterns inside JSX block
comments without the ' * ' continuation prefix and counts them as hex
colors. Adding the proper continuation prefix and rewording the issue
reference avoids the false positive while preserving the comment context.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
